title: Snapshot Registry
description: Maps every file under tests/golden/ to its npm generation script. Keys starting with '_' are metadata and may hold any value. All other keys must map to a non-empty string naming the npm script used to regenerate that golden file.

^_.description: Metadata key (underscore prefix). Any value is allowed.

^[^_].description: Registry entry. Value must be a non-empty string naming an npm script.
